submission.title: صندوق/تطبيق
submission.body:
حي اصحاب رؤوس الاموال، انصحونا فضلا

ايش افضل تطبيق لاستثمار الاموال (تمرة ،ملائة،ابيان) وليش؟

وهل فيه صندوق استثماري افضل؟

مين من البنوك يعطي افضل نسب على الودائع؟

comments.body: ملاءة كويسة من ناحية الرسوم و الاداء ولكن كل التطبيقات يستثمرون في نفس الصناديق و الاسهم ، البلاد عنده اعلى نسبه و يخرج زكاة
الصناديق تأخذ نسبة على شي اقدر أسويه بنفسي.
/u/whoiam3x تعال فهمهم
يبيلها وقت تتابع بنفسك وتقيم. موظفين ١٠ ساعات من يومنا رايحة في العمل تعقد الامور
صدق ناده
شكرا لك على النصيحة

هههههههه اسمع تمرة افضل شيء اذا انت جين زد، رسوم ريال بالشهر يعني ١٢ ريال سنويا وانت مو داري عن الدنيا ولا تفرق بين ربح وخسارة 

عاشوا تمرة صدق على هالمبادرة، الباقي ما حصل لهم شرف يعرفوني عليهم فما ادعمهم

اجل صرت تعتبرني راعي رأس أموال

الله يالدنيا
🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣🤣 حبيت النصيحة
شايف كيف

انصحك بتمرة وملاء ةوخاصة تمرة. أنا استخدم الاثنين ولكن افضل تمرة والحمدلله اداء محفظتي على مدى ٣ اشهر مرتفع بنسبة جيدة جداً مع العلم اني استخدم محفظة اعلى نسبة مخاطر. تختلف المحافظ حسب هدفك الشخصي (هدفي استثمار طويل ٢٠-٢٥ سنة على الأقل)
لكن البلاد أسهم فقط. ملاءة وتمرة (أسهم، عقار، صكوك وذهب) التنويع جداً جداً مهم
صحيح لكن من وجهة نظري تبقى الوديعة احسن ، الصكوك و العقار ماتعطي افضل عائد و الذهب سيء ، ادخل و ديعة مع البلاد و اقدر استثمر في صكوك و عقار بنفسي وبكذا وزعت مصادر دخلي وحققت اعلى نسبة عائد 👍
هل اداء تمره وملاءة نفس الشي تقريبا؟ وكيف اسعار اشتراكاتهم ؟
مافي احسن من investsky و اشتري صناديق امريكيه.

submission.title: صندوق الاهلي المرن
submission.body:
سلام عليكم
انا موظف توي اول سنه وودي ابدا استثمر ف صندوق الاهلي المرن.
هل عندكم اي نصايح او لصناديق افضل او شي تاني؟
واللي يعرف طريقه الاشتراك ف الصندوق يفيدني

comments.body: لازم تفتح حساب استثماري في بنك الاهلي

قاعده رقم صفر وزع المبلغ على اكثر من صندوق في اكثر من مجال


صندوق ساب المرن هو الأفضل اداء تقريبا ١٥٠٪؜ في آخر ٣ سنوات 

بنك الاهلي عندهم صندوق مميز اللي هو الشركات الصغيرة والمتوسطه العام الماضي حقق تقريبا ٧٠٪؜ 


ما ادري عن سبب اختيار البنك الأهلي هل انت معفى من رسوم الاشتراك حسب تصنيف الحساب

إذا كان ماعندك إعفاء من الرسوم فابحث خارج البنك الأهلي عن الأفضل اداء في آخر ٣ إلى ٥ سنوات 
انتبه بعض الصناديق ما كملت ٣ سنوات وتشوف أداءها ضعيف لكن حققت اداء جيد من وقت التاسيس 

أنا عندي إعفاء من الرسوم في اكثر   من بنك بس حقيقه ما يشدني الإعفاء إلا إذا كان احتاج المبلغ وراح اسحبه قبل يكمل سنه

الاستثمار في الصناديق لا يحتاج حساب استثماري في اغلب البنوك من الحساب الجاري تقدر تشترك
شفت احمد الصبان يتكلم عنه مبدئيا لازم فوق ٥ الاف بعدها تضيف الفين واكثر مافي اقل
كيف حصلت على الاعفاء
تصنيف حسابات العميل

هل فيه شي زي تداول بس للصناديق ؟

عجزت ألاقي معلومات

هذا

https://www.saudiexchange.sa/wps/portal/saudiexchange/ourmarkets/funds-market-watch/mutual-funds/!ut/p/z1/04_Sj9CPykssy0xPLMnMz0vMAfIjo8ziTR3NDIw8LAz8_V3NzQ0C3UL8DcMMXY1Mgsz0C7IdFQE4Stkh/


وفيه تطبيق اسمه (نخله) افضل للعرض والفلتره
يعطيك العافية

submission.title: CAEDREL COACH
submission.body:
Hi rat king,

I was wondering while am at the gym watching your latest YouTube videos, if you have the opportunity to caoch one LEC team and you choose the players you want for that team. Who's are these players. You can also choose the staff you wants.

Best Regards 
xdd

comments.body: top kiin
The answer is targamas, in fact I’d say 6 targamas (in case one targamas gets tired from so much running and needs to b subbed)
i think it's kinda mistranslating
That's why I'm asking. It's not sound like FAKER behavior.
The real question is has Pedro played Jump King yet?
Yeaaahhh good question xdd
He said it on stream because he was getting inted iirc xdd
Pretty sure it was just another deadpan Faker joke
I mean did you see him rant saying his team mate should get permanently banned the other day
He actually did say that after being inted by his teammates.
He said something similar about TFT too : that tft is all skill and league is all luck.
Faker gets inted 24/7. Shit realy is a diffrent level of game of chance for him.
NO WAY DONT SAY THAT
Yea and he also said that ranked is harder than worlds. I've seen his streams; He's definitely going through The Solo Q experience.

People always point out that Faker isn't the mechanical beast he was once and it's partially true. However, looking at how much he gets trolled, inted the past few years in soloqueue, it may be one of many factors. I can't recall the last time he was in the top 50 of the challenger ladder. 

KR solo queue is the perfect playground to keep your "hands hot" even more so than scrims since the latter is more "organized". Being stuck in Master, playing an opposition far from the top players of the server is unproductive.

Can't imagine the level of frustration with people betting on his games. Imagine some random dude ruining Lebron's training, every day for the past few years. Then again, players are all different and change over time, maybe he doesn't need to grind that much but with the volume of games played, he should be way higher.
Thinking of your analogy is hilarious 😂 I’m just imagining a trainer flattening all the basketballs right before practice or some stupid shit like that. Great response

Saw that rant and decided to watch his stream vod. If I got the correct game, the Kennen literally abandoned lane saying "open top" "jg dif" after dying twice. Got dived once (2v1) and then got ganked after over extending. The top got so tilted he decided to follow their jungle around the rift stealing experience and gold. Their teammates were begging top to return to his lane. The Kennen was also running it down in team fights, diving into engages and just.... dying. After watching that game... In that context, I absolutely understand where Faker was coming from in his threat (promise?) to contact riot to have the top laner get permabanned.  


Bonus trivia: The said troll player's last game has been 2 days ago which might mean he really got banned since his game history shows he plays everyday prior to that incident.
Faker and me getting inted by teammates, god has abandoned us
I think last year Faker got rank 32
I think he can get top50, just lacks the motivation to grind soloq with all inters. He won the bet against Ruler on who could get 1000lp first during Asian Games
Thank God he got banned (presumably) and thanks for adding the full context!
This is why LOL is a team game and not meant to play solo.
Ok what

There’s always a hint of truth in Faker’s jokes.

Like when he said NA is the best region in the world.
Another Faker W
Except Lebron would be able to find the trainer and flatten his ass but cowards are hiding behind anonymosity in LoL

Didn't know about that bet. Love the dynamic between them. 

I checked his opgg from time to time, never seen him higher* than 90-100... Forget about the 5th title, I want 1st KR Ladder.
What's the context of this? Ppl trolling up in challenger?
Real skill game for our Pedrito xdd
Faker and Tyler1. Baus got around this by being the biggest feeder in every game he plays.
That's not a joke, the GOAT speaking facts

https://preview.redd.it/ot9lkyk1qpec1.jpeg?width=259&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=b255c8a0a5b762a07297fa407fd5a2bcdfb00de6

Don't...
You doing ok recently?
dawg clearly are you stupid?
bro thinks he is him

https://preview.redd.it/5fprsc5p2rec1.jpeg?width=234&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=bd8cd79aca7af86c4115e3701163d1bd128bbc30

yes
OMG MAN!!!!
THIS IS WHY LOL IS A TEAM GAME AND NOT MEANT TO PLAY SOLO

Yeah, because of inters he was on a losing streak. This was the same stream that he said he’d report the Kennen and get him permabanned. So he basically meant it was a game of luck (with who you got in the team) and he’d go play a game of skill like Jump King. jump king is hard haha but he was also half joking because viewers hate him playing JK. Also the stream when his teammate was saying meh stuff in chat and faker sarcastically joked something like “sorry hyungs who have won worlds 10 times, i only won 4 times so i don’t know how to do well.”  It’s been rough for all of them, the chat basically tries to cheer them up.

​

https://preview.redd.it/yy9t8xgwbtec1.jpeg?width=244&format=pjpg&auto=webp&s=d1281c26ae44f78f498f6ee6266a88120ff7ccdd
Not in challenger, he’s still in master. But wants to go up so badly because these inters are driving him mad
Yo I’m worried about you and your cancer, I hope you come out on top!

submission.title: Finally Middle East can participate in Worlds

comments.body:
Imagine if Riot banned every single female champ during Worlds just because a Middle Eastern team was participating LMAO.

Not too farfetched considering they forced everybody to play on 35 ping because RNG couldn't travel.
LOL, that's not happening tho
literally what is the correlation of middle east and banning female champs?
https://kotaku.com/female-league-of-legends-characters-banned-at-an-irania-1213754332

the post belongs to... 2013. trust me, in 2024, this kind of tournament would not even take place in Iran. the reason would be the iranian government being one of a kind. I can tell you that, I am Iranian.

other middle eastern countries would not have problems like this. Iran is just a special case and trust me they would never send an esports team

I never even said it was actually happening LMAO. Just a speculation on what would it look like if Riot decided to ban all female champs.

Not the same situation as Iran but it would be funny if it actually happened
I am just clearing things up of course, no hostility here. just saying the situation would be different

Tournament idea: double elimination bracket for bottom 2,3, or 4 teams of each region, except you get eliminated only if you win twice in a row and you pass on to the next rounds if you lose. But in this case, teams who get “eliminated” first get higher prizes to incentivize actually trying.

submission.body: No wonder why every team want to join this. The winner price pool is also not that far from the worlds winner’s prize ($486,500). The format will be single elimination with BO3 of Quarter and Semifinals, and BO5 finals.

Im not sure. He said maybe will see the marches later.
But the tournament itself has a Twitch channel. It streamed all qualifications for the other games.
Do you know what it's called?
I watched qualifications of apex on ewc_apex. There is no one for leage till now, I guess. So maybe they will create the account later.
And i got downvoted for saying T1 owners wouldnt want to skip this tournament
all the bonus is not listed, prizepool look meh but there's so much hidden bonus for players and clubs participating that we don't know

I mean that's just the difference when it comes to "**company wealth**" and a "**whole ass country wealth**" they're completely different tiers of wealth and power, and then SA is even one of the wealthiest countries so obviously this is nothing to them; especially seeing as they use this tournament to deflect away from their alleged human rights violations and blatant shittiness.
When’s it last?

Just don't and don't support Saudi Arabia buying themselves into every single sport to give themselves a nicer image. Find it very hard to get excited for a random comp outside the Worlds circuit already anyway.
LCK/LPL NEW EASY MONEY HACK!
Bro hasnt heard of the iminent g2 offbrand golden road yet 🇪🇺😎🤙🇪🇺
Ah it seems Riot has an ounce of dignity left to not get completely bought out by the saudis yet.
I cant believe riot still doesn't add a prize pool
Im really wondering if this is worth it? Like will a LOL player be like the EWC was so cool so Saudi must be a good country? Is there going to be any association at all?

Nah this is welcome thing for league. Riot's prize pools are killing the pro scene. Orcs doesn't make enough to keep league teams profitable. Pro scene will come to end if they don't increase tournaments and prize pools.

First of all, I still don't like it happening on the back of Saudi blood and oil money. This is both morally problematic and likely to fuck with fans if more events are held there for the future.

But secondly, if that's true this is the worst way of addressing it. Having a small group of teams access prize money that's way bigger than what Riot offers just cements those teams as the leaders in their leagues and kills local interest, which is already not great as most viewers don't seem to care much about domestic competition (to me that's wild, I love watching LEC and internationals are just a bonus, but I know I'm a minority).

Just look at what UEFA money has done to small to medium sized football leagues in Europe.

Nobody has ever thought Saudi is good because of these tournaments. We only watch for the teams and games. And if you dont like international games outside worlds then you probably dont like high level play but only want to know who will get the prestige of being crowned champion.
I mean, yes, the prestige gives stakes and that's what makes it interesting. High level gameplay is cool but if I don't care who wins it's never going to grip me as much as if I do.
wfym dignity they cant let them go higher because riot cant accept amyone foing anything without them being involved or godforbid out-do then
this format suck, this dont count. semi, quarters and finals  should be bo5. We are back to season 2 worlds
lets go!
They cooked too hard with this and burnt their draft.

submission.title: Any tips for hologram monkey?
submission.body: At lvl 90 the hologram monkey became a nightmare for me. His random spawning monkeys oneshot any character i have and due to a slightly laggy gameplay i can sometimes regain connection noticing 2 of 3 characters been wiped out during a lagg sequense.  As everything else i need to read the pattern and dodge..but what pattern should I look for? Any tips on how to beat this last challange of the holograms 😭

comments.body:
The ghost monkeys aren’t random, they’re always timed after certain attacks. I got him after realizing which attacks they happen after and then it’s basically just extra dodging compared to the non-ghost monke versions. I found big monke to be the easiest holo cuz his attacks always follow the same “beat”

edit: you’ll never get it if you’re lagging that bad tho, it’s literally all about timing
Foresee the future and dewuther the waves of these monkeys
Thanks sounds like I'm at loss untillwe get a ps5 version then. Need to practice without lagg 🥶

If you are lagging, can't really help it tbh. But, for me, I didn't learn his moveset because he is slow either way. I just expected to dodge after every attack as the monkeys show up after he attacks.
Holo monkey is the easiest, re run it you will see a pattern to when the clone monkeys appear and they don’t appear during any major phases its imo the easiest holo boss

So basically master oogway the shit out of him, got it.

Dragon scroll, here i come. Skadoosh

>the random monkey spawns one shot me

They aren't random, they always appear after the same attacks.

Monkey is probably the easiest hologram (or 2nd easiest after Heron) because it follows a 100% fixed rotation. Once you learn it there's nothing that can catch you by surprise unlike with other holos.

So yeah, the tip is, just memorize its attack pattern.
don't get hit and you'll be fine
Lv up to 90
Slow down and count the attacks in 123 sequences. he isn't random.
When he does his spin attack just jump and use your glider. Buys you time to think and recover.
There are showcases of people soloing/hitless running these bosses you can learn how to dodge the attack patterns and good timings to do dmg from there

Imo he is easiest one but they're all hard I've 6/6 all the holo fights so I'll share some tips. You got to learn when those ghost monkeys appear. Boss usually does 2 big swings and on last swing ghost monkey appears. There is a part where he roars with his log after twirling and I think 4 ghost monkey appear. Sometimes the model of the ghost monkies don't even show up but still hit you. if you memorise when they come it becomes much easier. Yes lag makes fighting impossible here.
Throw a banana to distract him
ff

Im gonna answer as someone who also plays on mobile with lag lol but it’s best for you to play a few times without really intending to win, and to focus on looking for cues on when the ghost monkeys appear. They’re not as random as you may think. Don’t spam dodge cause you might miss the frame to actually dodge. The monkey hologram 6 is easiest amongst the others specifically because its ‘external’ attacks doesnt necessarily oneshot you and it has patterns. Also just use buffs and the inhalers if you need to lol no harm in that really it does help
This tips from streamer : every 2 atks on big monka, they summoned clone

khan- in my opinion, does not deserve worlds, s11 final, worst performer on DK especially game 5. S7, got swept by ssg in quarter finals, no msi champion

peanut- does not deserve worlds, s7, got gapped by ambition in the finals(skt also has another jungler blank), s12 semi final, got gapped by pyosik, chovy and him are the biggest reason they lost to drx. s6 we all know that peanut is a monster, but even if they beat skt, who knows if they can beat ssg(little people know that ssg also went to game 5 against skt in the finals), ever since s7 msi, peanut's performance on the worlds stage has been questionable.

caps- probably? he and uzi are the only 2 people who made to worlds finals twice and lost both. in s8,s9, caps won six bo5s, and all of them are against other regions(lcs \*2, lpl \*1, lck\*3), caps also has msi fmvp and tons of domestic titles. he is also not the worst performer on the team in s8 and s9 finals. you also have to consider the fact that eu is very far from korea so EU does not get access to scrims agaisnt asia teams and korea server. so in my opinion caps probably? deserves a worlds title? but his finals performance is questionable in s8 s9. 

uzi- does not deserve it. unlike caps winning 6 bo5 against other regions in 2 years, the 2 years uzi made to finals(s3,s4), he only won one bo5 against other regions(it was fnc in s3). so the quality of the second place is questionable. in s7, uzi definitely does not deserves worlds title because there is no way rng can beat ssg in the finals, many people don't understand that s7 went from an adc carry meta to toplane split push, kill pressure botlane meta, letme was rng's weakspot in s7, cuvee was ssg's strong point, so the chance of them beating ssg is small. and in s8, we all know what happened, rng spent 9 ban slots on hjarnan in total, but uzi still cannot carry the game.

in conclusion, i feel like the only 2 people that probably deserves a worlds title are caps and smeb

Caps. He's my goat

The fact that people are saying that if Peanut win worlds title he becomes the best jungler ever is extremely absurd to me. Just shows how fucked up the titles mentality is, especially when it comes to Worlds title.

1. Uzi: Dude sweated, bled and ultimately sacrificed his health and career for something that was always just one step, one click out of reach.

2. Ming: Overshadowed by perhaps the most mechanically gifted ADC in the World but great player with painful shortcomings nevertheless.

3. Khan: 3rd because did come mindblowingly close, however also shat his pants BADLY multiple times internationally. Love the dude tho. However I'd see Smeb as more fitting choice for "Deserved" in this case.

4. Peanut: Personally I'm not unbiased here. I think SKT's fall in 2017 was in part clearly his fault as he just couldn't even slightly adapt to the meta. Also chocked at recent events with Gen.G. Has all the potential, never uses it fully.

5. Caps: The best in the west without doubt. But that's it. The best player in the west, and only there.

Asking if Bin deserves a Worlds title is giga weird tho. Like, dude is at the peak of his career and skill rn, in the best team he could ask for, and even if not this year he still has plenty left to go as he's literally only 20yo. Did he deserve with with Suning? Kinda maybe? But in 2023, absolutely not. Which, again, is fine. I do think he'll get it sooner or later. But I wouldn't put him in a rank with those guys. Even Peanut has much less time left than him.
